title: The Gospel According to St. Matthew
actors: Enrique Irazoqui, Margherita Caruso, Susanna Pasolini
plot: The life of Jesus Christ according to the Gospel of Matthew. Film shows Christ as a Marxist avant-la-lettre and therefore uses half of the text of Matthew.
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 7 wins & 9 nominations total
